title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 434.030 - Money lost at gaming recovered, how,
text:
434.030.  Money lost at gaming recovered, how, — Any person who shall lose any money or property at any game, gambling device or by any bet or wager whatever, may recover the same by a civil action.
(RSMo 1939 § 3392, A.L. 1953 p. 321) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3005; 1919 § 5742; 1909 § 6623
